mapper.select: SELECT email_id, email, email_type, subject, content, code, send_status, send_time, expire_time, create_time FROM email_record WHERE email_id = #{emailId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_record (email, email_type, subject, content, code, send_status, send_time, expire_time) VALUES (#{email}, #{emailType}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{code}, #{sendStatus}, #{sendTime}, #{expireTime})
